{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603231803095EB747423F0481E0B633\"}"},"total":9441},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6985017921689502479","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事情节引人入胜，这是目前为止我看到的较好的小说了。作者有一定的中医功底，对人情事故也窥见一斑，有一定生活基础和文化底蕴。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626326224,"group_id":"6807402732790483971","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3OYVv1izHTlYCy1AHWLocnPrPOypUiEovOhOLp3Aw6G","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2660467731600396","user_name":"万法不侵的唐文惠孝帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2660467731600396","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6807402732790483971","book_info":{"abstract":"他是一个让世界著名财团总裁看见都为之颤抖的男人。他是一个治疗好无数病人的神医。他让地球修真界中修行者见面膜拜。他让各路美女倒追。杨东浩也很无奈，他其实只是遵从师命，进入都市，一边打工，一边修炼的“打工仔”而已！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/f0e2fa449533c3694eb2202bf7bc7f1b","author":"超级老猪","author_id":"","book_id":"6807402732790483971","book_name":"打工医圣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u002
